titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَارَى الْبَيْتَ وَ السَّفِينَةَ
titles.en: Chapter 147 – The man rents the house and the ship

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَارَى الْبَيْتَ وَ السَّفِينَةَ
titles.en: Chapter 147 – The man rents the house and the ship

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَكْتَرِي السَّفِينَةَ سَنَةً أَوْ أَقَلَّ أَوْ أَكْثَرَ قَالَ الْكِرَى لَازِمٌ إِلَى الْوَقْتِ الَّذِي اكْتَرَاهُ إِلَيْهِ وَ الْخِيَارُ فِي أَخْذِ الْكِرَى إِلَى رَبِّهَا إِنْ شَاءَ أَخَذَ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ تَرَكَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَكْتَرِي السَّفِينَةَ سَنَةً أَوْ أَقَلَّ أَوْ أَكْثَرَ قَالَ الْكِرَى لَازِمٌ إِلَى الْوَقْتِ الَّذِي اكْتَرَاهُ إِلَيْهِ وَ الْخِيَارُ فِي أَخْذِ الْكِرَى إِلَى رَبِّهَا إِنْ شَاءَ أَخَذَ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ تَرَكَ .

segments: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from his father Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,

‘I asked Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the man who hired the ship for a year, or less or more. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The hire charges are necessitated up to the time which he had hired it up to, and the choice in taking the hire charges is up to its owner, if he so desires to he takes, and if he so desires to he leaves’.
en.hubeali.text:
A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Yaqteen, from his father Al Husayn, from Ali Bin Yaqteen who said,

‘I asked Abu Al Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the man who hired the ship for a year, or less or more. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The hire charges are necessitated up to the time which he had hired it up to, and the choice in taking the hire charges is up to its owner, if he so desires to he takes, and if he so desires to he leaves’.

segments: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin from his brother al-Husayn from Ali ibn Yaqtin who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who rents a ship for a year or less or more. He (the Imam) said, ‘The lease is binding up to the end of its term. Receiving payment of rent is up to the owner who may accept it or leave it.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin from his brother al-Husayn from Ali ibn Yaqtin who has said the following: “This is concerning my question before abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who rents a ship for a year or less or more. He (the Imam) said, ‘The lease is binding up to the end of its term. Receiving payment of rent is up to the owner who may accept it or leave it.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/393)
gradings.label: صحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/393)

narratorChain.raw: عِدَّةٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِنَا عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَقْطِينٍ عَنْ أَخِيهِ الْحُسَيْنِ عَنْ عَلِيِّ بْنِ يَقْطِينٍ قَالَ

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَارَى الْبَيْتَ وَ السَّفِينَةَ
titles.en: Chapter 147 – The man rents the house and the ship

segments: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَارَى مِنَ الرَّجُلِ الْبَيْتَ وَ السَّفِينَةَ سَنَةً أَوْ أَكْثَرَ أَوْ أَقَلَّ قَالَ كِرَاهُ لَازِمٌ إِلَى الْوَقْتِ الَّذِي تَكَارَاهُ إِلَيْهِ وَ الْخِيَارُ فِي أَخْذِ الْكِرَى إِلَى رَبِّهَا إِنْ شَاءَ أَخَذَ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ تَرَكَ .
arabic.text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَتَكَارَى مِنَ الرَّجُلِ الْبَيْتَ وَ السَّفِينَةَ سَنَةً أَوْ أَكْثَرَ أَوْ أَقَلَّ قَالَ كِرَاهُ لَازِمٌ إِلَى الْوَقْتِ الَّذِي تَكَارَاهُ إِلَيْهِ وَ الْخِيَارُ فِي أَخْذِ الْكِرَى إِلَى رَبِّهَا إِنْ شَاءَ أَخَذَ وَ إِنْ شَاءَ تَرَكَ .

segments: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sahl, from his father who said,

‘I asked Abu Al Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> about the man who rents the house and the ship from the man for a year, or more or less. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Its rent is necessitated up to the time which he had hired it to, and the choice regarding taking the rent is up to its owner, if he so desires to he takes, and if he so desires to he leaves’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Sahl, from his father who said,

‘I asked Abu Al Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> about the man who rents the house and the ship from the man for a year, or more or less. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Its rent is necessitated up to the time which he had hired it to, and the choice regarding taking the rent is up to its owner, if he so desires to he takes, and if he so desires to he leaves’.

segments: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Sahl from his father who has said the following: “Regarding my question before abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who rents a ship or house from another man for a year or more or less. He (the Imam) said, ‘Payment of rent up to the end of the term is incumbent, but accepting payment of rent or leaving it is up to the owner who may like to receive or leave it.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Sahl from his father who has said the following: “Regarding my question before abu al-Hassan, Musa, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who rents a ship or house from another man for a year or more or less. He (the Imam) said, ‘Payment of rent up to the end of the term is incumbent, but accepting payment of rent or leaving it is up to the owner who may like to receive or leave it.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/394)
gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/394)

narratorChain.raw: أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سَهْلٍ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ
